purpose: Locked CUSTODES organ lane requiring explicit owner gate before activation.
truth_rules: Locked state must never be rendered as active or connected.
Activation requires explicit owner gate and backend onboarding task.
proof_requirements: Locked status and owner-gate requirement shown in reports.
fake_green_risks: Locked lane represented as implementable-ready without owner gate.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
backend_source_unknown_reason: Locked governance lane; no active backend binding in current stage.
